nasb.text: But John tried to prevent Him, saying, “I have need to be baptized by You, and do You come to me?”

esv.text: John would have prevented him, saying, “I need to be baptized by you, and do you come to me?”

cnv.text: 約翰想要阻止他，說：“我應該受你的洗，你卻到我這裡來嗎？”

ccb.text: 约翰想要拦住祂，就说：“应该是你为我施洗才对，你反倒来找我？”

csbs.text: 约翰想要阻止他，说：“我需要受你的洗礼，你反而到我这里来吗？”
